title: Classic Diamonds
description: Relive the good ol' days of diamond mining
body:
### ◆ Classic Diamonds
- - -
Miss the rush of pure excitement when finding diamonds? Feeling nostalgic? Want to travel back into the era of strip mining? Classic Diamonds repaints diamonds diamond ore with a fresh coat of nostalgia.
- - -
Includes:
- Diamond
- Diamond ore
- Deepslate diamond ore
- - -
![Diamonds dropped after mining diamond ore](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de277d367e4a7f02c2e7cf4da0d449530896423f.png)
